repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
contents_tesim: Mahbub ibn Constantine, The book of history

This text contains part one of the two-part Book of History. Part one can also be found in Sinai Arabic 456, while part two is only known in MS Florence, Biblioteca Medicea Laurenziana – Or. 132 (dated to 1288 CE).

This text contains part one of the two-part Book of History. Part one can also be found in Sinai Arabic 456, while part two is only known in MS Florence, Biblioteca Medicea Laurenziana – Or. 132 (dated to 1288 CE).
